color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
GDPR
What personal data was used?
Was consent valid?

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
EU AI Act
Can the decision be traced?
Is there human oversight?

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CCPA
Was data sold or shared?
Can the consumer opt out?

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
DMA
Which platform was used?
Under whose authority?

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
HIPAA
Was PHI exposed?
Was access authorized?

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SOX
Are financial metrics certified?
Is the audit trail complete?

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; font-size: 14px !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ALL CONVERGE ON:
What context was used to reach this decision?

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; font-size: 14px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
